user_message: Working on Tailspin Toys's renewal risk. Got the escalation email -- help me identify the blockers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-17 16:51 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

There's been a change in our timeline for renewal risk. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 10:50 EST
Subject: renewal risk - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-O trap (Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-O failure mode (Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-O -- Decision-email triggers across BPF/forecast/milestone -- no unified writeback pr
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
